'''Rayl'skar''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]], was the [[Clan Askar]] [[Clan leader|leader]] partly blamed for a riot on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. He and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] were accused of firing on unarmed protesters, while in fact they had been fired on by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agents.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
